_comment: Google Business Profile yorumlarının snapshot'ı. Build script bunu OKUR (API çağrısı yok → Vercel'de çalışır). Hetzner cron'u (fetch-google-reviews) periyodik tazeler → git push → Vercel redeploy. Elle düzenleme: sadece küratörlü ek yorum eklerken.

reviews.name: Viorica Selar
reviews.text: This cruise was a unique experience! From the moment you board, you are greeted by hospitable, welcoming people and you feel welcome! The food was excellent, the service impeccable. The entertainers and dancers were at their best, they kept us in a vibrant rhythm and offered show, grace and traditions! I would repeat this experience endlessly!

reviews.name: deniz öktem
reviews.text: It was a wonderful night 💃 The food, the shows, everything was perfect.

reviews.name: weareaspect
reviews.text: Went on an evening cruise with bn really enjoyable. amazing views smooth organization. Good value for the price, would recommend

reviews.name: Ayşe Keleş
reviews.text: Great night, perfect show and amazing dinner
